sprints.name: Quick Wins
sprints.rationale: No-brainer items: one-line changes, inject existing data into existing features, and small guards. Ship in a single session.

items.title: SEO audit AI → gpt-4o-mini cost savings
items.notes: Switched seo-audit AI recommendations from gpt-4o to gpt-4o-mini. ~17x cost reduction per audit.

items.title: Content brief: GA4 page performance injection
items.notes: GA4 landing page data (sessions, bounce rate, engagement, conversions) now injected into brief generation prompt when GA4 is connected.

items.title: Concurrent background job limits
items.notes: hasActiveJob guard on 7 job types: seo-audit, schema-generator, keyword-strategy, bulk-compress, bulk-alt, bulk-seo-fix. Returns 409 with existing jobId.

sprints.name: Revenue Engine
sprints.rationale: Direct revenue impact: justify retainer with ROI data, prevent churn, enable self-service upgrades, and unlock prepaid revenue via credits.

items.title: ROI dashboard (Premium)
items.notes: Organic traffic value in dollars (GSC clicks × SEMRush CPC). Ad spend equivalent. Content ROI. Growth trend. Blurred soft-gate for free/growth. GET /api/public/roi/:wsId

items.title: Self-service tier upgrade via Stripe
items.notes: Shipped — plan_growth/plan_premium product types, Stripe Checkout for tier upgrades, webhook auto-upgrades tier, all mailto links replaced

items.title: Churn prevention signals
items.notes: Daily background job: no-login 14d, chat drop-off, no requests 30d, health score drop, trial ending, payment failed. Positive signals: traffic up 20%, high engagement. Alerts in Command Center

items.title: Usage tracking + limits
items.notes: Track AI conversations, briefs, strategies per workspace per month. Usage indicators (3 of 4 briefs remaining). Overage prompts. Admin usage dashboard

items.title: Credits system
items.notes: Prepaid credit packs ($500/5cr, $900/10cr, $1600/20cr). Per-product credit costs. Purchase via Stripe. Admin can grant credits. Deduct on fulfillment

sprints.name: Client Value & Retention
sprints.rationale: Features that keep clients engaged, prove value, and reduce churn. Each one adds a reason to stay.

items.title: Client onboarding wizard
items.notes: Guided first-time experience: connect site, run first audit, explore key features. Reduces early drop-off

items.title: "What happened this month" summary
items.notes: Auto-generated plain-English monthly summary. AI synthesizes GSC/GA4/audit changes into 3-5 bullet insights. Shows on Overview + email

items.title: Content performance tracker
items.notes: Track GSC/GA4 performance per published post. Proves content ROI to clients — clicks, impressions, rankings over time since publish date

items.title: AI anomaly detection
items.notes: Background job to flag traffic/conversion anomalies. Alerts admin and client when significant changes detected. Proactive value.

items.title: Automated competitive monitoring
items.notes: Monthly competitor audit, alert on improvements. Shows clients you're watching the landscape

sprints.name: Platform Scale & Integrations
sprints.rationale: Features that expand the platform's reach: white-label for resale revenue, webhooks for integrations, multi-modal chat for differentiation.

items.title: White-label domain support
items.notes: CNAME + reverse proxy. Configurable branding (logo, colors, favicon, email sender, chatbot persona). Agency resale tiers ($299-999/mo). New revenue stream.

items.title: Webhook / Zapier triggers
items.notes: Fire webhooks on key events (audit complete, content delivered, payment received, chat session). Enables automation integrations

items.title: AI chatbot: multi-modal responses
items.notes: Inline charts, data tables, export in chat responses. Differentiator from basic chatbot competitors

items.title: Responsive mobile layout
items.notes: Sidebar → bottom nav, stacked cards on small screens. Required for white-label clients on mobile

sprints.name: Team, Workflow & Polish
sprints.rationale: Internal team features (only when hiring), content workflow improvements, and quality-of-life polish.

items.title: Internal team management
items.notes: Invite team members, manage roles, assign workspaces, disable accounts. Needed when hiring/contracting

items.title: Permission-based feature access
items.notes: Fine-grained: client_member view-only on approvals, member can't delete workspaces

items.title: Writer assignment
items.notes: Assign content briefs to specific writers. Track who's working on what

items.title: Content calendar
items.notes: Visual calendar of content in production with due dates. Bird's eye view of content pipeline

items.title: Notification preferences
items.notes: Per-user email settings, digest frequency, in-app notification bell

sprints.name: Backlog
sprints.rationale: Revisit quarterly. Prioritize when a specific client need or revenue opportunity justifies it.

items.title: Multi-competitor analysis
items.notes: Compare against 2-3 competitors simultaneously

items.title: Shared notes / wiki per workspace
items.notes: Team-internal notes about a client

items.title: Client NPS survey
items.notes: Periodic in-dashboard satisfaction survey

items.title: GSC 404 import for redirect scanner
items.notes: Pull crawl errors from GSC to seed redirect scanner

items.title: Audit historical trend charts
items.notes: Track audit score over time per-page, not just site-wide

items.title: Schema auto-schedule
items.notes: Re-generate schemas on cadence, flag stale pages

items.title: Competitor historical comparisons
items.notes: Track competitor gap over time

items.title: Competitor keyword overlap
items.notes: Show shared keywords and where you win/lose

items.title: Historical redirect comparison
items.notes: Track redirect status over time, detect new 404s

items.title: Full-site PageSpeed scan
items.notes: Multi-page PSI scan as background job

items.title: Accessibility audit expansion
items.notes: WCAG contrast, ARIA, heading order, form labels

items.title: WCAG AA full compliance
items.notes: Focus indicators, keyboard nav for all interactive elements

items.title: GSC: URL Inspection API
items.notes: Per-URL indexing status, crawl info

items.title: GA4: Exit pages + attribution
items.notes: Advanced analytics

items.title: Webflow Enterprise API: 301 redirects
items.notes: Push rules via API (Enterprise-only)

items.title: Sales report: branded PDF export
items.notes: Downloadable prospect reports with agency branding

items.title: Sales report: email delivery
items.notes: Send reports directly to prospects

items.title: Heavy dependency audit / tree-shaking
items.notes: Verify Lucide tree-shaking, audit chart libs

items.title: Sales report: CRM integration
items.notes: Push prospect data to HubSpot/Pipedrive when a report is generated

items.title: Schema generator → gpt-4o upgrade
items.notes: CONDITIONAL: One-line model change in schema-suggester.ts. Blocked by 30K TPM limit on current OpenAI org tier. Switch when tier reaches 200K+ TPM on gpt-4o.

sprints.name: ✅ SHIPPED — AI Chatbot Revenue Engine
sprints.rationale: Fastest path to visible client value and upsell potential. No dependencies.

items.title: Client AI: Full dashboard context
items.notes: Feed audit, strategy, ranks, content pipeline, approvals, activity, annotations into chatbot

items.title: Client AI: Global knowledge base
items.notes: Per-workspace knowledgeBase field + knowledge-docs/ folder, injected into both chatbots

items.title: Client AI: Sales engine behavior
items.notes: 8 revenue hooks, Insights Engine branding, warm handoff pattern

items.title: Admin AI chat panel
items.notes: Shipped — /api/admin-chat endpoint + AdminChat.tsx with internal analyst persona

items.title: Admin GA4 dashboard upgrade
items.notes: Shipped — Sparklines, period comparison, organic, new vs returning, conversions

items.title: Workspace Home Dashboard
items.notes: Shipped — Per-workspace landing page with parallel-fetched data

items.title: Audit pipeline: error sort + flag + Fix→ + auto-fix
items.notes: Shipped — Pages sorted by errors, Flag for Client workflow, Fix→ routes to tools with auto-generation context

items.title: Sidebar restructure + Command Center
items.notes: Shipped — Icon-only bottom bar, Command Center button, grouped nav

items.title: Stripe admin settings in Command Center

items.title: Workspace tier field + TierGate component

items.title: 14-day Growth trial for new workspaces

items.title: Page type → content opportunity mapping
